prompt: Hyper-realistic 8k medium shot of a young East Asian woman with long, straight brunette hair standing in a lush tropical park. She wears a black ribbed tank top with square sunglasses hooked into the neckline and dark indigo denim jeans, posing with both hands tucked into her front pockets. The background features a soft bokeh of a towering palm tree and a white multi-story building under an overcast sky. Composition is eye-level and centered with a shallow depth of field. Lighting is diffuse and natural, emphasizing sharp skin textures and fabric weave. Color palette: 40% vibrant green, 25% deep black and denim, 20% neutral white and skin tones, 15% sky blue. Highly detailed skin textures, sharp focus, masterpiece, no text, textless, no words, no letters.
